headline: 3 Insurance Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: Insurance providers use their expertise in risk assessment to help protect assets while offering consumers peace of mind through comprehensive coverage options. Furthermore, favorable market conditions have supported premium growth and investment income, a trend that has enabled the industry to return 3.9% over the past six months, almost identical to the S&P 500.
